title: Equity Residential Provides Operating Update
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today provided an update regarding certain same store Residential operating trends in its business. Same store revenue growth remains on track to meet or exceed the midpoint of the Company's guidance range described in its second quarter 2022 earnings release.
